title: gomphocarpus fruticosus
intro: Gomphocarpus fruticosus, also known as the hairy ball or balloon plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from joint pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
